zh.lifeSummary: 當Noadiah Seward於1742年2月25日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德達勒姆時，他的父親Dr. Ebenezer Seward38歲，母親Dorothy Rose30歲。他於1765年10月31日與Sarah Swain在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾格蘭維爾結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1820年住在美國紐約州賀爾吉莫蕾托 法爾斯。他於16年登記服兵役。他去世於1825年3月29日在美國紐約州奧瑟格伍斯特享年83歲，埋葬在美國紐約州奧瑟格德卡度 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Noadiah Seward于1742年2月25日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德達勒姆时，他的父亲Dr. Ebenezer Seward38岁，母亲Dorothy Rose30岁。他于1765年10月31日与Sarah Swain在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾格蘭維爾结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1820年住在美国纽约州賀爾吉莫蕾托 法爾斯。他于16年登记服兵役。他去世于1825年3月29日在美国纽约州奧瑟格伍斯特享年83岁，埋葬在美国纽约州奧瑟格德卡度 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Seward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Seward (Old English Sǣweard, from sǣ ‘sea’ + weard ‘guard’).
English: from the Middle English personal name Siward, Seward (Old English Sigeweard, from sige ‘victory’ + weard ‘guard’, or the equivalent Old Norse Sigwarth).
Irish (Cork): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Suaird, Ó Suairt, usually Anglicized as Sword .

variants.name: Sewer
meanings: African American: probably an altered form of English   Seward  .
Swiss German: habitational name for someone from either of two places called Seewen (Schwyz and Solothurn).
Germanized or Americanized form of Slovenian and Croatian   Sever  .

variants.name: Sword
meanings: English: probably a shortened form of   Seward  .
English: nickname from Middle English sword(e), swerd(e) ‘sword’, perhaps used for a swordsman or armourer.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Suaird, Ó Suairt ‘descendant of Suart’, a personal name derived from Old Norse Sigvarthr ‘victory keeper’, a cognate of Old English Sigeweard; compare Seward 2.

variants.name: Sheward
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Seward  .

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: Shays' Rebellion
historicEvents.description: Caused by war veteran Daniel Shays, Shays' Rebellion was to protest economic and civil rights injustices that he and other farmers were seeing after the Revolutionary War. Because of the Rebellion it opened the eyes of the governing officials that the Articles of Confederation needed a reform. The Rebellion served as a guardrail when helping reform the United States Constitution.
Oldest grave seen in the memorials list.
War of 1812. U.S. declares war on Britain over British interference with American maritime shipping and westward expansion.

en.lifeSummary: When Noadiah Seward was born on 25 February 1742, in Durham, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Dr. Ebenezer Seward, was 38 and his mother, Dorothy Rose, was 30. He married Sarah Swain on 31 October 1765, in Granville, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 5 daughters. He lived in Little Falls, Herkimer, New York, United States in 1820. He registered for military service in 16. He died on 29 March 1825, in Worcester, Otsego, New York, United States, at the age of 83, and was buried in Decatur Cemetery, Otsego, New York, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Noadiah Seward est né le 25 février 1742, à Durham, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Dr. Ebenezer Seward, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Dorothy Rose, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Sarah Swain le 31 octobre 1765, à Granville, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 5 filles. Il a vécu à Little Falls, Herkimer, New York, États-Unis en 1820. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 16. Il est décédé le 29 mars 1825, à Worcester, Otsego, New York, États-Unis, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterré à Decatur Cemetery, Otsego, New York, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Noadiah Seward am 25. Februar 1742 in Durham, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Dr. Ebenezer Seward 38 und seine Mutter Dorothy Rose 30. Er hat am 31. Oktober 1765 in Granville, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Sarah Swain geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1820 hat er in Little Falls, Herkimer, New York, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er hat sich 16 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 29. März 1825 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Worcester, Otsego, New York, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Decatur Cemetery, Otsego, New York, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Noadiah Seward è nato il il 25 febbraio 1742 nel Durham, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Dr. Ebenezer Seward, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Dorothy Rose, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Sarah Swain il 31 ottobre 1765, nel Granville, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 5 figlie. Vissuto a Little Falls, Herkimer, New York, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1820. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 16. Morì il 29 marzo 1825, nel Worcester, Otsego, New York, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 83 anni, e fu sepolto a Decatur Cemetery, Otsego, New York, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Noadiah Sewardが1742年2月25日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードダルハムで生まれた時，父Dr. Ebenezer Sewardは38歳，母Dorothy Roseは30歳であった。1765年10月31日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアグランヴィルでSarah Swainと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1820年にはアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州ハーキマーリットル ファルズに住んでいた。彼は16年に兵役登録をした。彼は1825年3月29日にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州オトセゴウオルセスターで83歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州オトセゴデカトゥル セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut, Britis: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 길퍼드
ko.Decatur Cemetery, Otsego, New York, Unit: 미국 뉴욕 주 츠고 데카투르 세멧리
ko.Durham, Hartford, Connecticut, British C: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 뒤람
ko.Little Falls, Herkimer, New York, United: 미국 뉴욕 주 허킴어 리틀 팰스
ko.Granville, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 그랜빌
ko.lifeSummary: Noadiah Seward(이)가 1742년 2월 25일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 뒤람에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Dr. Ebenezer Seward(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Dorothy Rose(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1765년 10월 31일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 그랜빌에서 Sarah Swain(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1820년도에 미국 뉴욕 주 허킴어 리틀 팰스에서 살았다. 그는 16년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1825년 3월 29일 미국 뉴욕 주 츠고 워스스터에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 뉴욕 주 츠고 데카투르 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Noadiah Seward nasceu em 25 de fevereiro de 1742, em Durham, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, seu pai, Dr. Ebenezer Seward, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Dorothy Rose, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Sarah Swain em 31 de outubro de 1765, em Granville, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele viveu em Little Falls, Herkimer, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América em 1820. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 16. Ele faleceu em 29 de março de 1825, em Worcester, Otsego, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América, com 83 anos, e foi sepultado em Decatur Cemetery, Otsego, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Granville, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay: гранвилл, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Noadiah Seward родился 25 февраля 1742 г. в местности дурам, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Dr. Ebenezer Seward было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Dorothy Rose, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Swain 31 октября 1765 г. в местности гранвилл, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он жил в местности литл фаллс, хиркимир, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты в 1820 году. В 16 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 29 марта 1825 г. в местности ворсестир, оцего, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 83 лет и был похоронен в местности декатур кеметири, оцего, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты.

es.25 February 1742–29 March 1825: 25 de febrero de 1742–29 de marzo de 1825

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Noadiah Seward nació el 25 de febrero de 1742, en Durham, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Dr. Ebenezer Seward, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Dorothy Rose, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Sarah Swain el 31 de octubre de 1765, en Granville, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 5 hijas. Vivió en Little Falls, Herkimer, Nueva York, Estados Unidos en 1820. Se enlistó en el ejército en 16. Murió el 29 de marzo de 1825, en Worcester, Otsego, Nueva York, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 83 años, y fue sepultado en Decatur Cemetery, Otsego, Nueva York, Estados Unidos.
